name: 内格夫 | 无畏战神
descriptionEn: The Negev is a beast that can keep the enemy at bay with its pin-point supressive fire, provided you have the luxury of time to gain control over it. It has been given a base coat of blue metallic paint then hand-painted with metallic gold swirls and accents. Turn some heads before you take them off
descriptionZh: 子弹极多，射速极快的内格夫非常适合在多数回合中快速清场，作为交换，它的价格极其不菲，具有高扩散和令人发狂的后坐力。 这把武器以蓝色金属为外表，然后手绘了金色的漩涡形花纹。 欲将其爆头，必先使其伸头
